requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Detection and Suppression — Local Fire Authority Approval in Mauritania
requirement_topic.zh: BESS火灾探测和灭火——毛里塔尼亚当地消防主管机关审批
requirement_topic.zht: BESS火災探測和滅火——茅利塔尼亞當地消防主管機關審批

summary.en: Mauritania's fire safety regulatory framework for industrial and commercial facilities is administered at the national level through the Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC — Directorate General of Civil Protection, under the Ministry of Interior). All utility-scale and commercial BESS installations are expected to require DGPC approval (or that of the relevant local authority having jurisdiction) for fire-safety system design, including fire detection, suppression, and emergency response planning. Mauritania has not published a confirmed national BESS-specific fire safety standard; donor/lender-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB) typically reference internationally recognised codes such as IEC 62933-5-2 and NFPA 855 in project technical specifications. The specific fire code applicable to BESS in Mauritania — and whether NFPA 855 or an equivalent has been formally adopted — has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date. This is a high-priority item requiring direct verification with Mauritanian authorities and the project's fire safety engineer.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚工商业设施消防安全监管框架由国家层面的国家民事保护总局（DGPC——民事保护总局，隶属内政部）负责管理。所有公用事业规模及商业BESS装置预计须取得DGPC（或相关地方主管机关）对消防系统设计的审批，包括火灾探测、灭火及应急响应规划。毛里塔尼亚尚未发布经确认的国家BESS专属消防安全标准；捐赠方/贷款方融资项目（世界银行、非开行）通常在项目技术规格中引用IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855等国际认可规范。毛里塔尼亚适用于BESS的具体消防规范——以及NFPA 855或等效规范是否已正式采纳——截至本数据集日期尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。这是一个高优先级事项，须直接向毛里塔尼亚当局及项目消防安全工程师核实。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞工商業設施消防安全監管框架由國家層面的國家民事保護總局（DGPC——民事保護總局，隸屬內政部）負責管理。所有公用事業規模及商業BESS裝置預計須取得DGPC（或相關地方主管機關）對消防系統設計的審批，包括火災探測、滅火及應急響應規劃。茅利塔尼亞尚未發布經確認的國家BESS專屬消防安全標準；捐贈方/貸款方融資項目（世界銀行、非開行）通常在項目技術規格中引用IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855等國際認可規範。茅利塔尼亞適用於BESS的具體消防規範——以及NFPA 855或等效規範是否已正式採納——截至本數據集日期尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。這是一個高優先級事項，須直接向茅利塔尼亞當局及項目消防安全工程師核實。

standards_or_laws: Direction Générale de la Protection Civile (DGPC) — Mauritania national civil protection authority; BESS-specific fire approval requirements not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; referenced in donor/lender project specifications; Mauritania formal adoption not confirmed)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level fire and safety standard expected in donor/lender project specifications)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (cell-level thermal runaway safety baseline)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire authority review. GB 44240-2024 (mandatory from August 2025) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Mauritanian authorities or donor/lender frameworks as equivalent to internationally recognised BESS fire safety codes. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2 aligned documentation and NFPA 855 aligned installation design for project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防主管机关审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月起强制执行）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被毛里塔尼亚当局或捐赠方/贷款方框架认可为等同于国际认可的BESS消防安全规范。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在项目审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-2的文件及符合NFPA 855的安装设计。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防主管機關審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月起強制執行）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被茅利塔尼亞當局或捐贈方/貸款方框架認可為等同於國際認可的BESS消防安全規範。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在項目審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-2的文件及符合NFPA 855的安裝設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions; mandatory from August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Mauritania fire authority (DGPC) approval is expected to be a mandatory installation gate for BESS projects. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation alone does not satisfy internationally expected BESS fire codes referenced by donor/lender project specifications. Key actions: (a) confirm directly with DGPC and the project's fire safety engineer which fire code applies to BESS installations in Mauritania (NFPA 855 adoption status; French code references from APSAD or other frameworks may also be relevant as Mauritania is a Francophone country); (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection and ventilation design, suppression system design (note: Mauritania desert climate imposes constraints on water-based suppression — gaseous or aerosol systems may be preferred), emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure fire detection and suppression equipment is certified by an internationally accredited laboratory where required; (d) engage a fire protection engineer experienced in Francophone African project requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：毛里塔尼亚消防主管机关（DGPC）审批预计是BESS项目的强制安装门槛。仅有中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足捐赠方/贷款方项目规格所引用的国际认可BESS消防规范。关键行动：（a）直接向DGPC及项目消防安全工程师确认适用于毛里塔尼亚BESS安装的消防规范（NFPA 855采纳状态；毛里塔尼亚为法语国家，APSAD或其他法语框架的消防规范引用也可能相关）；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测和通风设计、灭火系统设计（注：毛里塔尼亚沙漠气候对水基灭火有制约——气体或气溶胶系统可能更适用）、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保消防探测和灭火设备在需要时经国际认可实验室认证；（d）聘请具有法语非洲国家项目经验的消防工程师。
gap.zht: 差距：茅利塔尼亞消防主管機關（DGPC）審批預計是BESS項目的強制安裝門檻。僅有中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足捐贈方/貸款方項目規格所引用的國際認可BESS消防規範。關鍵行動：（a）直接向DGPC及項目消防安全工程師確認適用於茅利塔尼亞BESS安裝的消防規範（NFPA 855採納狀態；茅利塔尼亞為法語國家，APSAD或其他法語框架的消防規範引用也可能相關）；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測和通風設計、滅火系統設計（注：茅利塔尼亞沙漠氣候對水基滅火有制約——氣體或氣溶膠系統可能更適用）、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保消防探測和滅火設備在需要時經國際認可實驗室認證；（d）聘請具有法語非洲國家項目經驗的消防工程師。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory — DGPC approval required for BESS installations in Mauritania; BESS-specific fire code has not been confirmed from public sources as of dataset date — verify directly with DGPC and the project fire safety engineer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Mauritania Ministry of Interior (parent authority of Direction Générale de la Protection Civile — DGPC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritania fire authority (DGPC) approval is expected to be a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy internationally expected BESS fire codes referenced in donor/lender project specifications. Engage DGPC and a fire protection engineer with Francophone Africa project experience at the earliest stage to confirm the applicable fire code, any NFPA 855 adoption status, and design requirements — particularly for desert climate fire suppression system selection. No publicly confirmed Mauritania BESS fire-safety specification has been identified as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里塔尼亚消防主管机关（DGPC）审批预计是商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足捐赠方/贷款方项目规格中引用的国际认可BESS消防规范。尽早与DGPC及具有法语非洲国家项目经验的消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范、NFPA 855采纳状态及设计要求——特别是沙漠气候灭火系统选型。截至本数据集日期，尚未发现已公开确认的毛里塔尼亚BESS消防安全规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 茅利塔尼亞消防主管機關（DGPC）審批預計是商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足捐贈方/貸款方項目規格中引用的國際認可BESS消防規範。盡早與DGPC及具有法語非洲國家項目經驗的消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範、NFPA 855採納狀態及設計要求——特別是沙漠氣候滅火系統選型。截至本數據集日期，尚未發現已公開確認的茅利塔尼亞BESS消防安全規格。

requirement_topic.en: BESS Thermal Runaway Management and Site Fire Safety — Extreme Desert Environment Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS热失控管理及现场消防安全——极端沙漠环境要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS熱失控管理及現場消防安全——極端沙漠環境要求

summary.en: Mauritania presents extreme environmental challenges for BESS fire safety design beyond standard IEC or NFPA baselines. Sahara Desert ambient temperatures routinely exceed 45°C and can approach 50°C in summer — well above the standard 40°C IEC design reference temperature for BESS enclosures. This elevated ambient temperature significantly increases lithium battery thermal stress, accelerates cell ageing and self-heating, and raises the baseline risk of thermal runaway events. Additionally, severe sand and dust ingress (particularly in desert interior sites) and coastal salt fog at Nouakchott and Nouadhibou impose additional stress on fire detection sensors, suppression system components, and BESS enclosure seals. Standard Chinese BESS container designs certified for 40°C ambient and standard dust ingress levels (IP54 or similar) are not adequate for Mauritanian desert conditions without environmental derating, upgraded enclosures (IP65+), and climate control (active cooling with high-efficiency thermal management). NFPA 855 compliant fire detection and suppression systems must also be specified and tested for tropical desert ambient conditions.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚为BESS消防安全设计带来超出标准IEC或NFPA基准的极端环境挑战。撒哈拉沙漠环境温度常规超过45°C，夏季可接近50°C——远超IEC BESS外壳标准设计参考温度40°C。这一升高的环境温度显著增加锂电池热应力，加速电芯老化和自发热，并提高热失控事件的基线风险。此外，努瓦克肖特和努瓦迪布的严重沙尘侵入（特别是沙漠内陆站点）和沿海盐雾对火灾探测传感器、灭火系统部件及BESS外壳密封造成额外压力。针对40°C环境温度和标准防尘等级（IP54或类似）认证的标准中国BESS集装箱设计，若不进行环境降额、外壳升级（IP65+）及气候控制（采用高效热管理的主动冷却），则不适合毛里塔尼亚沙漠条件。符合NFPA 855的火灾探测和灭火系统还须针对热带沙漠环境条件进行规定和测试。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞為BESS消防安全設計帶來超出標準IEC或NFPA基準的極端環境挑戰。撒哈拉沙漠環境溫度常規超過45°C，夏季可接近50°C——遠超IEC BESS外殼標準設計參考溫度40°C。這一升高的環境溫度顯著增加鋰電池熱應力，加速電芯老化和自發熱，並提高熱失控事件的基線風險。此外，努瓦克肖特和努瓦迪布的嚴重沙塵侵入（特別是沙漠內陸站點）和沿海鹽霧對火災探測感測器、滅火系統部件及BESS外殼密封造成額外壓力。針對40°C環境溫度和標準防塵等級（IP54或類似）認證的標準中國BESS集裝箱設計，若不進行環境降額、外殼升級（IP65+）及氣候控制（採用高效熱管理的主動冷卻），則不適合茅利塔尼亞沙漠條件。符合NFPA 855的火災探測和滅火系統還須針對熱帶沙漠環境條件進行規定和測試。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries — includes thermal abuse test requirements; standard design reference may not cover Mauritania peak ambient temperatures (unconfirmed — verify with test laboratory)
IEC 60529 — Degrees of Protection Provided by Enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 minimum recommended for Mauritania desert/coastal environments (dust-tight, water jet protected)
NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems — thermal management, thermal runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, and suppression requirements
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems — thermal runaway propagation prevention requirements

summary.en: Chinese BESS container designs are typically validated for standard IEC ambient conditions (up to 40°C) and China-specific environmental conditions. GB/T 36558-2023 and related standards do not specifically address Mauritania's extreme heat (up to 50°C ambient), severe sand/dust ingress (desert interior), or coastal salt fog conditions. Chinese manufacturers offer IP54 to IP65 rated BESS containers; for Mauritania, IP65-rated enclosures with high-efficiency active cooling designed for 50°C ambient operation are required. Standard Chinese BESS fire detection and suppression designs (gas detection, aerosol suppression) are broadly applicable, but must be validated for the higher ambient temperatures and desert dust conditions of Mauritania. Thermal management systems (TMS) must be explicitly sized and validated for 50°C ambient, not 40°C.
summary.zh: 中国BESS集装箱设计通常针对标准IEC环境条件（最高40°C）和中国特定环境条件进行验证。GB/T 36558-2023及相关标准未专门针对毛里塔尼亚的极端高温（环境温度高达50°C）、严重沙尘侵入（沙漠内陆）或沿海盐雾条件。中国制造商提供IP54至IP65等级的BESS集装箱；对于毛里塔尼亚，须采用设计为50°C环境运行的IP65等级外壳配高效主动冷却。标准中国BESS火灾探测和灭火设计（气体探测、气溶胶灭火）总体适用，但须针对毛里塔尼亚更高环境温度和沙漠粉尘条件进行验证。热管理系统（TMS）须明确针对50°C环境温度（而非40°C）进行设计和验证。
summary.zht: 中國BESS集裝箱設計通常針對標準IEC環境條件（最高40°C）和中國特定環境條件進行驗證。GB/T 36558-2023及相關標準未專門針對茅利塔尼亞的極端高溫（環境溫度高達50°C）、嚴重沙塵侵入（沙漠內陸）或沿海鹽霧條件。中國製造商提供IP54至IP65等級的BESS集裝箱；對於茅利塔尼亞，須採用設計為50°C環境運行的IP65等級外殼配高效主動冷卻。標準中國BESS火災探測和滅火設計（氣體探測、氣溶膠滅火）總體適用，但須針對茅利塔尼亞更高環境溫度和沙漠粉尘條件進行驗證。熱管理系統（TMS）須明確針對50°C環境溫度（而非40°C）進行設計和驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems — standard ambient temperature range may not cover 50°C Mauritania desert conditions)
GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (cell thermal safety; standard test conditions may not cover Mauritania peak ambient — verify with test lab)

gap.en: Gap: Mauritania's extreme operating environment creates safety design requirements beyond standard IEC and Chinese GB baselines. Key gaps: (a) ambient temperature derating — BESS TMS must be designed and validated for 50°C ambient, not standard 40°C; verify with the manufacturer that cell thermal management maintains cells within safe operating temperature limits at 50°C ambient; (b) enclosure protection — IP65 minimum is recommended for Mauritania desert/coastal sites; standard IP54 designs are not adequate; (c) fire suppression system selection — water-based suppression (sprinklers) is severely constrained in desert interior sites with limited water availability; gaseous (FM-200, Novec 1230) or aerosol suppression systems are preferred but must be specified, sized, and maintained for desert dust conditions; (d) fire detection sensor calibration — confirm that gas sensors and heat detectors are rated for 50°C ambient and are not adversely affected by sand/dust ingress; (e) thermal runaway propagation mitigation — particularly important in outdoor desert BESS containers where cooling failure risk is higher during grid outages or cooling system faults.
gap.zh: 差距：毛里塔尼亚极端运行环境对安全设计提出超出标准IEC和中国GB基准的要求。主要差距：（a）环境温度降额——BESS热管理系统须针对50°C环境温度（而非标准40°C）进行设计和验证；向制造商核实电芯热管理在50°C环境温度下能将电芯保持在安全工作温度范围内；（b）外壳防护——建议毛里塔尼亚沙漠/沿海站点至少达到IP65等级；标准IP54设计不足；（c）灭火系统选型——水基灭火（喷水灭火器）在水资源有限的沙漠内陆站点受到严重制约；气体（FM-200、Novec 1230）或气溶胶灭火系统更适用，但须针对沙漠粉尘条件进行规格设计和维护；（d）火灾探测传感器校准——确认气体传感器和热探测器额定为50°C环境温度，且不受沙尘侵入不利影响；（e）热失控蔓延缓解——对于户外沙漠BESS集装箱尤为重要，因为在电网停电或冷却系统故障时冷却失效风险更高。
gap.zht: 差距：茅利塔尼亞極端運行環境對安全設計提出超出標準IEC和中國GB基準的要求。主要差距：（a）環境溫度降額——BESS熱管理系統須針對50°C環境溫度（而非標準40°C）進行設計和驗證；向製造商核實電芯熱管理在50°C環境溫度下能將電芯保持在安全工作溫度範圍內；（b）外殼防護——建議茅利塔尼亞沙漠/沿海站點至少達到IP65等級；標準IP54設計不足；（c）滅火系統選型——水基滅火（噴水滅火器）在水資源有限的沙漠內陸站點受到嚴重制約；氣體（FM-200、Novec 1230）或氣溶膠滅火系統更適用，但須針對沙漠粉塵條件進行規格設計和維護；（d）火災探測感測器校準——確認氣體感測器和熱探測器額定為50°C環境溫度，且不受沙塵侵入不利影響；（e）熱失控蔓延緩解——對於戶外沙漠BESS集裝箱尤為重要，因為在電網停電或冷卻系統故障時冷卻失效風險更高。

mandatory_status.target: Required by project design and donor/lender environmental standards — extreme environment ratings are typically specified in project technical requirements; Mauritania national standard for desert BESS environment ratings not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Not explicitly addressed in standard Chinese BESS product certifications for Mauritania conditions — requires project-specific engineering and validation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritania's extreme desert environment (up to 50°C ambient, severe sand/dust, coastal salt fog) requires BESS designs that go beyond standard IEC 40°C and IP54 baselines. IP65+ enclosures and thermal management systems validated for 50°C ambient are required. Standard Chinese BESS containers must be verified — and if necessary upgraded — for Mauritanian conditions before deployment. Fire suppression system selection must account for desert water scarcity; gaseous or aerosol systems are preferred. Engage a fire protection engineer and BESS thermal engineer with tropical desert project experience to validate the full design package before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里塔尼亚极端沙漠环境（环境温度高达50°C、严重沙尘、沿海盐雾）要求BESS设计超出标准IEC 40°C和IP54基准。须采用针对50°C环境验证的IP65+外壳和热管理系统。标准中国BESS集装箱须在部署前针对毛里塔尼亚条件进行核实，必要时升级。灭火系统选型须考虑沙漠水资源匮乏；气体或气溶胶系统更适用。在采购前，聘请具有热带沙漠项目经验的消防工程师和BESS热工程师对完整设计方案进行验证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 茅利塔尼亞極端沙漠環境（環境溫度高達50°C、嚴重沙塵、沿海鹽霧）要求BESS設計超出標準IEC 40°C和IP54基準。須採用針對50°C環境驗證的IP65+外殼和熱管理系統。標準中國BESS集裝箱須在部署前針對茅利塔尼亞條件進行核實，必要時升級。滅火系統選型須考慮沙漠水資源匱乏；氣體或氣溶膠系統更適用。在採購前，聘請具有熱帶沙漠項目經驗的消防工程師和BESS熱工程師對完整設計方案進行驗證。

requirement_topic.en: BESS Site and Building Fire Code — ARE/DGPC Approval and Construction Permits
requirement_topic.zh: BESS站点和建筑消防规范——ARE/DGPC审批及建设许可
requirement_topic.zht: BESS站點和建築消防規範——ARE/DGPC審批及建設許可

summary.en: Utility-scale BESS installations in Mauritania require construction permits and building approvals in addition to fire-safety system approvals. For standalone BESS or BESS co-located with solar PV or wind farms, the site plan and building/structure design must comply with Mauritanian building codes and be approved by relevant municipal or national authorities. For donor/lender-financed projects, lender environmental and social standards (IFC PS, AfDB ISS) require that facilities comply with host country building and fire safety laws. The interaction between ARE licensing, DGPC fire-safety approvals, municipal construction permits, and donor/lender E&S requirements creates a multi-authority approval chain that must be mapped out early in the project development stage. Specific Mauritanian building code references for utility-scale BESS outdoor installations have not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚公用事业规模BESS装置除消防系统审批外，还须取得建设许可和建筑审批。对于独立BESS或与光伏或风电场配套的BESS，站点规划和建筑/结构设计须符合毛里塔尼亚建筑规范，并取得相关市政或国家主管机关批准。对于捐赠方/贷款方融资项目，贷款方环境和社会标准（IFC绩效标准、非开行综合保障体系）要求设施符合东道国建筑和消防安全法律。ARE许可、DGPC消防安全审批、市政建设许可与捐赠方/贷款方环境和社会要求之间的关联，形成须在项目开发阶段早期梳理的多主管机关审批链。截至本数据集日期，毛里塔尼亚户外公用事业规模BESS装置的具体建筑规范参考尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞公用事業規模BESS裝置除消防系統審批外，還須取得建設許可和建築審批。對於獨立BESS或與光伏或風電場配套的BESS，站點規劃和建築/結構設計須符合茅利塔尼亞建築規範，並取得相關市政或國家主管機關批准。對於捐贈方/貸款方融資項目，貸款方環境和社會標準（IFC績效標準、非開行綜合保障體系）要求設施符合東道國建築和消防安全法律。ARE許可、DGPC消防安全審批、市政建設許可與捐贈方/貸款方環境和社會要求之間的關聯，形成須在項目開發階段早期梳理的多主管機關審批鏈。截至本數據集日期，茅利塔尼亞戶外公用事業規模BESS裝置的具體建築規範參考尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。

standards_or_laws: Mauritania building and construction regulations — site plan and structure approval required (specific code references unconfirmed as of dataset date)
ARE licensing framework — building and construction as part of project approval (specific requirements unconfirmed)
IFC Performance Standards PS1 and PS3 — require host country building/fire safety compliance for financed projects
NFPA 855 (as adopted or referenced in project specification) — site separation distances and building layout requirements for BESS

summary.en: Chinese BESS projects require local fire authority approval and construction permits under Chinese building regulations. These domestic approvals have no validity in Mauritania. For Chinese BESS exports, the container-based BESS configuration (factory-built, container-integrated systems) does not eliminate the need for site approvals in Mauritania — even prefabricated container BESS requires site plan approval, foundation design review, fire safety review, and electrical installation inspection by Mauritanian authorities and donor/lender technical advisors.
summary.zh: 中国BESS项目依据中国建筑法规须取得地方消防主管机关批准和建设许可。这些国内审批在毛里塔尼亚无效。对于中国BESS出口，基于集装箱的BESS配置（工厂建造、集装箱集成系统）不能免除在毛里塔尼亚获得现场审批的需求——即使是预制集装箱BESS也须获得毛里塔尼亚当局和捐赠方/贷款方技术顾问的站点规划审批、基础设计审查、消防安全审查及电气安装检查。
summary.zht: 中國BESS項目依據中國建築法規須取得地方消防主管機關批准和建設許可。這些國內審批在茅利塔尼亞無效。對於中國BESS出口，基於集裝箱的BESS配置（工廠建造、集裝箱集成系統）不能免除在茅利塔尼亞獲得現場審批的需求——即使是預製集裝箱BESS也須獲得茅利塔尼亞當局和捐贈方/貸款方技術顧問的站點規劃審批、基礎設計審查、消防安全審查及電氣安裝檢查。

standards_or_laws: Chinese local fire authority approval and construction permit procedures — not transferable to Mauritania
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (site installation requirements covered; not applicable to Mauritanian approval process)

gap.en: Gap: Mauritanian site and building approvals for BESS are required through a multi-authority chain (ARE, DGPC, municipal authorities) that must be mapped during project development. Chinese domestic approvals are not transferable. Key steps: (a) identify all Mauritanian permitting authorities for the specific project site and engage them early; (b) confirm the applicable building and fire codes for outdoor utility-scale BESS in Mauritania — these are not confirmed from public sources as of the dataset date; (c) for donor/lender projects, lender technical advisors will require evidence of host-country permitting compliance — document the full approval chain; (d) container BESS foundation design must account for Mauritanian desert soil conditions (sandy, low bearing capacity in coastal areas), wind loading (Harmattan dust storms), and seismic requirements (low to moderate seismicity in Mauritania — confirm local design basis).
gap.zh: 差距：毛里塔尼亚BESS站点和建筑审批须通过多主管机关链（ARE、DGPC、市政当局）进行，须在项目开发阶段梳理。中国国内审批不可转用。关键步骤：（a）识别特定项目站点的所有毛里塔尼亚许可主管机关并尽早接触；（b）确认毛里塔尼亚户外公用事业规模BESS适用的建筑和消防规范——截至本数据集日期尚未从公开来源确认；（c）对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，贷款方技术顾问将要求东道国许可合规证据——记录完整审批链；（d）集装箱BESS基础设计须考虑毛里塔尼亚沙漠土壤条件（沿海地区砂质土、低承载力）、风荷载（哈马丹沙尘暴）及抗震要求（毛里塔尼亚低至中等地震活动性——确认当地设计基准）。
gap.zht: 差距：茅利塔尼亞BESS站點和建築審批須通過多主管機關鏈（ARE、DGPC、市政當局）進行，須在項目開發階段梳理。中國國內審批不可轉用。關鍵步驟：（a）識別特定項目站點的所有茅利塔尼亞許可主管機關並盡早接觸；（b）確認茅利塔尼亞戶外公用事業規模BESS適用的建築和消防規範——截至本數據集日期尚未從公開來源確認；（c）對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，貸款方技術顧問將要求東道國許可合規證據——記錄完整審批鏈；（d）集裝箱BESS基礎設計須考慮茅利塔尼亞沙漠土壤條件（沿海地區砂質土、低承載力）、風荷載（哈馬丹沙塵暴）及抗震要求（茅利塔尼亞低至中等地震活動性——確認當地設計基準）。

mandatory_status.target: Expected mandatory — construction permits and fire-safety approvals from Mauritanian authorities required before commissioning; specific BESS-applicable codes not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Chinese local fire authority and construction permits required; not transferable to Mauritania

source.publisher: ARE (Autorité de Régulation — Mauritania Energy Regulatory Authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritanian site and building approvals for BESS involve a multi-authority chain (ARE, DGPC, municipal authorities) that must be mapped and navigated during project development — Chinese domestic approvals have no validity in Mauritania. For donor/lender projects, the lender technical advisor will require evidence of full host-country permitting compliance. Container BESS foundation design must be validated for Mauritanian desert soil, wind (Harmattan), and seismic conditions. Applicable building codes have not been confirmed from public sources as of the dataset date — engage Mauritanian regulatory consultants and the project's civil/structural engineer early.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里塔尼亚BESS站点和建筑审批涉及须在项目开发期间梳理和推进的多主管机关链（ARE、DGPC、市政当局）——中国国内审批在毛里塔尼亚无效。对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，贷款方技术顾问将要求东道国完整许可合规证据。集装箱BESS基础设计须针对毛里塔尼亚沙漠土壤、风（哈马丹）及地震条件进行验证。截至本数据集日期，适用建筑规范尚未从公开来源确认——尽早聘请毛里塔尼亚监管顾问和项目土木/结构工程师。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 茅利塔尼亞BESS站點和建築審批涉及須在項目開發期間梳理和推進的多主管機關鏈（ARE、DGPC、市政當局）——中國國內審批在茅利塔尼亞無效。對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，貸款方技術顧問將要求東道國完整許可合規證據。集裝箱BESS基礎設計須針對茅利塔尼亞沙漠土壤、風（哈馬丹）及地震條件進行驗證。截至本數據集日期，適用建築規範尚未從公開來源確認——盡早聘請茅利塔尼亞監管顧問和項目土木/結構工程師。
